entries.title: Service Times
entries.text: Sundays: Sunrise Service 7:30am and Sunshine Service 10:30am. Wednesdays: Carpe Diem 6:30am. Thursdays: Open Heavens 6:00pm. Fridays: Praise Hour 12:00pm.

entries.title: Church Location
entries.text: The church is at The Rock Shopping Centre, Vue Cinema, The Rock, Bury, BL9 OND, Manchester, United Kingdom.

entries.title: Online Services
entries.text: Services are available online through YouTube and the Watch Live page.

entries.title: Prayer Support
entries.text: Visitors can submit confidential prayer requests. The prayer team prays daily and can contact people who opt in.

entries.title: Counselling
entries.text: The church offers free confidential counselling: pre-marital, marriage, family, individual, spiritual guidance and grief support.

entries.title: Membership
entries.text: New visitors can take next steps through the E-Membership page and membership classes.

entries.title: Giving
entries.text: Online giving is available through the Give page with secure options including card and transfer pathways.
